setting: A guest calling the front desk because the AC is broken and they need towels.
lyrics:
[Verse 1]
Walking down the hall, trying to find some peace
But the heat in this room just won't decrease
I pick up the phone, dial down to the desk
Hoping they can help me get a little rest

[Chorus]
The AC in my room doesn't seem to be working
Just blowing warm air, while the heat is lurking
Could we get some extra towels while you're on the way?
Hoping we can finally cool down today
Send maintenance up, yeah, send them right away

[Verse 2]
I apologize for the inconvenience, sir
We'll get it sorted out, it's all a blur
Is it not turning on, or just blowing warm?
We'll fix it up before it does any harm

[Chorus]
The AC in my room doesn't seem to be working
Just blowing warm air, while the heat is lurking
Could we get some extra towels while you're on the way?
Hoping we can finally cool down today
Send maintenance up, yeah, send them right away

[Bridge]
How long do you think it will take to repair?
Ten minutes max, we'll have somebody there
Housekeeping is bringing fresh towels to your door
You won't have to worry or complain anymore

[Outro]
Just blowing warm air.
We'll be right there.
Extra towels on the way.
Have a comfortable stay.
(Fade out)

lyricsJa.en: [Verse 1]
Walking down the hall, trying to find some peace
lyricsJa.ja: 廊下を歩いて、少しでも休まる場所を探している

lyricsJa.en: But the heat in this room just won't decrease
lyricsJa.ja: だけど、この部屋の暑さはちっとも和らがない

lyricsJa.en: I pick up the phone, dial down to the desk
lyricsJa.ja: 受話器を取って、フロントへダイヤルする

lyricsJa.en: Hoping they can help me get a little rest
lyricsJa.ja: 少しでも休めるように、助けてもらえることを願って

lyricsJa.en: [Chorus]
The AC in my room doesn't seem to be working
lyricsJa.ja: 「部屋のエアコンが動いていないようなんです」

lyricsJa.en: Just blowing warm air, while the heat is lurking
lyricsJa.ja: 熱気がまとわりつく中で、生ぬるい風が吹くばかり

lyricsJa.en: Could we get some extra towels while you're on the way?
lyricsJa.ja: 「そちらに向かうついでに、追加のタオルももらえますか？」

lyricsJa.en: Hoping we can finally cool down today
lyricsJa.ja: 今日こそ、ようやく涼むことができるように

lyricsJa.en: Send maintenance up, yeah, send them right away
lyricsJa.ja: 「すぐにメンテナンス担当者を向かわせます」

lyricsJa.en: [Verse 2]
I apologize for the inconvenience, sir
lyricsJa.ja: 「ご不便をおかけして申し訳ありません」

lyricsJa.en: We'll get it sorted out, it's all a blur
lyricsJa.ja: 混乱はすぐに解決いたしますから

lyricsJa.en: Is it not turning on, or just blowing warm?
lyricsJa.ja: 「全く電源が入らないのでしょうか？それとも生ぬるい風ですか？」

lyricsJa.en: We'll fix it up before it does any harm
lyricsJa.ja: 被害が出る前に、しっかりと修理いたします

lyricsJa.en: [Chorus]
The AC in my room doesn't seem to be working
lyricsJa.ja: 「部屋のエアコンが動いていないようなんです」

lyricsJa.en: Just blowing warm air, while the heat is lurking
lyricsJa.ja: 熱気がまとわりつく中で、生ぬるい風が吹くばかり

lyricsJa.en: Could we get some extra towels while you're on the way?
lyricsJa.ja: 「そちらに向かうついでに、追加のタオルももらえますか？」

lyricsJa.en: Hoping we can finally cool down today
lyricsJa.ja: 今日こそ、ようやく涼むことができるように

lyricsJa.en: Send maintenance up, yeah, send them right away
lyricsJa.ja: 「すぐにメンテナンス担当者を向かわせます」

lyricsJa.en: [Bridge]
How long do you think it will take to repair?
lyricsJa.ja: 「修理にはどのくらいかかりそうですか？」

lyricsJa.en: Ten minutes max, we'll have somebody there
lyricsJa.ja: 「最大でも10分、すぐにスタッフを向かわせます」

lyricsJa.en: Housekeeping is bringing fresh towels to your door
lyricsJa.ja: 「清掃係が、ドアまで新しいタオルをお持ちしますよ」

lyricsJa.en: You won't have to worry or complain anymore
lyricsJa.ja: もう心配したり、不満を言ったりする必要はありません

lyricsJa.en: [Outro]
Just blowing warm air.
lyricsJa.ja: 生ぬるい風しか出ない。

lyricsJa.en: We'll be right there.
lyricsJa.ja: すぐにうかがいます。

lyricsJa.en: Extra towels on the way.
lyricsJa.ja: 追加のタオルもお持ちします。

lyricsJa.en: Have a comfortable stay.
lyricsJa.ja: 快適なご滞在を。

lyricsJa.en: (Fade out)
lyricsJa.ja: (フェードアウト)

conversation.speaker: A

sentences.text: The AC in my room doesn't seem to be working.
sentences.displayHtml: The AC in my room doesn't seem to be working.

conversation.japanese: こんにちは。402室に滞在しているのですが、部屋のエアコンが動いていないようなんです。

conversation.speaker: B

sentences.text: Is it not turning on at all, or just not blowing cold air?
sentences.displayHtml: Is it not turning on at all, or just not blowing cold air?

conversation.japanese: 申し訳ございません。全く電源が入らないのでしょうか？それとも冷たい風が出ない状態ですか？

conversation.speaker: A

sentences.text: It's turning on, but it's just blowing warm air.
sentences.displayHtml: It's turning on, but it's just blowing warm air.

conversation.japanese: 電源は入るんですが、生ぬるい風しか出ていなくて。かなり寝苦しくなっています。

conversation.speaker: B

sentences.text: I'll send maintenance up right away to take a look.
sentences.displayHtml: I'll send maintenance up right away to take a look.

conversation.japanese: ご不便をおかけして申し訳ありません。すぐにメンテナンス担当者を向かわせて確認いたします。

conversation.speaker: A

sentences.text: Also, could we get some extra towels?
sentences.displayHtml: Also, could we get some extra towels?

sentences.text: We only have two in the bathroom.
sentences.displayHtml: We only have two in the bathroom.

conversation.japanese: ありがとうございます。あと、追加のタオルをもらえますか？バスルームに2枚しかなくて。

conversation.speaker: B

sentences.text: I'll have housekeeping bring up fresh towels immediately.
sentences.displayHtml: I'll have housekeeping bring up fresh towels immediately.

conversation.japanese: かしこまりました。清掃係に新しいタオルをすぐにお持ちさせます。

conversation.speaker: A

sentences.text: How long do you think maintenance will take?
sentences.displayHtml: How long do you think maintenance will take?

conversation.japanese: 助かります。メンテナンスはどのくらいかかりそうですか？

conversation.speaker: B

sentences.text: They should be there within ten minutes.
sentences.displayHtml: They should be there within ten minutes.

sentences.text: Please let us know if you need anything else!
sentences.displayHtml: Please let us know if you need anything else!

conversation.japanese: 10分以内には到着するはずです。他に必要なことがあればお知らせください！
